MTZ1.description: MasterPact MTZ1 — up to 1600A, standard ACB for PrismaSeT P main incomer

MTZ2.description: MasterPact MTZ2 — 1600A to 4000A, large ACB for high current PrismaSeT P

MTZ3.description: MasterPact MTZ3 — 4000A to 6300A, very large ACB for Okken or large PrismaSeT

vbb_door_clues: No visible breaker handles, switches, or vents
Always on left or right side of the panel
Significantly narrower than functional section door
functional_section_clues: Wider door — wider than VBB door
Visible breaker handles, MCCBs, MCBs or wiring
May have cable entry glands at bottom
safety_rules: VBB compartment contains live busbars at ALL times — even when panel is de-energised at incomer
Do NOT drill, cut, or penetrate VBB compartment door
Isolate upstream supply before any work near VBB compartment
Minimum approach clearance: 300mm from VBB door face

PrismaSeT G.notes: No VBB compartment — locate_vbb not applicable for this panel type

Okken.notes: Okken uses horizontal busbar system — no VBB side compartment

inference_rules: If MTZ1 detected → functional section ≥ 400mm → VBB width likely 150mm or 200mm
If MTZ2 detected → functional section ≥ 600mm → VBB width likely 250mm or 300mm
If MTZ3 detected → functional section ≥ 800mm → VBB width likely 300mm
Narrow blank door proportion < 30% of total panel width → strong VBB indicator
If rated current on nameplate ≤ 630A → VBB = 150mm
If rated current on nameplate 800A–1250A → VBB = 200mm
If rated current on nameplate 1600A–2500A → VBB = 250mm
If rated current on nameplate ≥ 3200A → VBB = 300mm
